titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Al-Numan
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Al-Numan

segments: ه عن عليّ بن النعمان فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى؛ و إبراهيم بن هاشم جميعا عن عليّ بن النعمان‌.
arabic.text: ه عن عليّ بن النعمان فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى؛ و إبراهيم بن هاشم جميعا عن عليّ بن النعمان‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Ali ibn Al-Numan, I have narrated it from my father and Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - through Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, and Ibrahim ibn Hashim, all from Ali ibn Al-Numan.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Ali ibn Al-Numan, I have narrated it from my father and Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - through Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, and Ibrahim ibn Hashim, all from Ali ibn Al-Numan.
